name: Rental Contract - Before Cancel
script:
submitted_invoices = frappe.get_all("Sales Invoice", filters={"rental_contract": doc.name, "docstatus": 1}, fields=["name"])

if submitted_invoices:
    invoice_list = ", ".join([inv["name"] for inv in submitted_invoices])
    frappe.throw(f"Cannot cancel. Submitted invoices exist: {invoice_list}. Please cancel them first.")
